links.description: Enable Markdown dead-link checking. Default true.

summaries.description: Enable summary freshness checking (content-hash based). Default true.

CairnNamingConfig.description: Configurable filenames for the summary system.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor autocomplete/validation. Ignored by cairn.

ignore.description: Globs to exclude from scanning. Default ["**/node_modules/**"].

locale.description: Prose locale for generated guidance and report strings. Default "en".

requireDirSummaries.description: Require a directory summary in every in-scope directory. Default true.

roots.description: Documentation roots to scan (globs allowed). Default ["docs"].

stampCommand.description: Command agents should run to stamp hashes after editing docs.

allOf.description: Line count above which a file needs a summary. Non-negative integer. Default 30.

CairnConfig.title: cairn configuration
CairnConfig.description: Configuration for the cairn CLI (.cairnrc.json, .cairnrc, or the "cairn" key of package.json).
